message:
Hi Marcus,

Thank you for reaching out about the React Dashboard project. I’m very interested and would love to learn more about the scope, timeline, and budget you have in mind.

My standard rate is $80/hr, and I’m available to start next week. Please let me know any additional details or requirements so we can discuss how I can best help.

Looking forward to your reply.

Best regards,
Jordan Mitchell
